title: biophytum proliferum
intro: Biophytum proliferum, also known as the 'variegated leaf plant' or 'mukuna', is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biophytum proliferum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and combat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Biophytum proliferum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
